description: Spring REST controller where Log4j logger.info() is only called in a test class (AppTest.java), not in production code. CVE-2021-44228 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: logger.info() is only called in AppTest.java. Production App.java has no Log4j imports or usage.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable logger.info() call only exists in AppTest.java which is a test class not part of the production runtime. The main App.java has no Log4j usage.
